title: Validate Experiment Cohort Targeting Logic
description: Tests that the Trial Corner feature is only shown to the correct user cohort based on consumption behavior.
preconditions: Two new users (User A, User B) have just activated their ₹1 trial.

steps.description: 1. With User A, start watching a video and watch for less than 5 minutes, then return to the homepage.
2. With User B, start watching a video and watch for more than 5 minutes, then return to the homepage.
3. Observe the homepage for User A.
4. Observe the homepage for User B.

expected_result: User A (consumption < 5 mins) should see the 'Trial Mode' widget. User B (consumption > 5 mins) should NOT see the 'Trial Mode' widget and should see the standard user experience.
